text: Refund Policy: damaged or defective items are refunded within 14 days of delivery.
Shipping Policy: orders ship within 2 business days via standard courier.
Order Tracking: use the tracking link in your order confirmation email.
Password Reset: click 'Forgot password' on the login page and follow the emailed link.
Returns: to return an item, print the prepaid return label from your account.
Warranty: electronics carry a 1-year limited warranty against manufacturing defects.
